name: linktik
description: LinkTik - QR Code & Link Management Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=scanner-app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=scanner-app
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --workspace=backend" "npm run lint --workspace=frontend" "npm run lint --workspace=scanner-app"
